1.text: "Do not let your hearts be troubled. You believe in God; believe also in Me.
1.speaker: Jesus

2.text: In My Father's house are many rooms. If it were not so, would I have told you that I am going there to prepare a place for you?
2.speaker: Jesus

3.text: And if I go and prepare a place for you, I will come back and welcome you into My presence, so that you also may be where I am.
3.speaker: Jesus

4.text: You know the way to the place where I am going."
4.speaker: Jesus

verses.5: "Lord," said Thomas, "we do not know where You are going, so how can we know the way?"

segments.text: "I am the way and the truth and the life. No one comes to the Father except through Me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

7.text: If you had known Me, you would know My Father as well. From now on you do know Him and have seen Him."
7.speaker: Jesus

verses.8: Philip said to Him, "Lord, show us the Father, and that will be enough for us."

segments.text: "Philip, I have been with you all this time, and still you do not know Me? Anyone who has seen Me has seen the Father. How can you say, 'Show us the Father'?
segments.speaker: Jesus

10.text: Do you not believe that I am in the Father and the Father is in Me? The words I say to you, I do not speak on My own. Instead, it is the Father dwelling in Me, performing His works.
10.speaker: Jesus

11.text: Believe Me that I am in the Father and the Father is in Me — or at least believe on account of the works themselves.
11.speaker: Jesus

12.text: Truly, truly, I tell you, whoever believes in Me will also do the works that I am doing. He will do even greater things than these, because I am going to the Father.
12.speaker: Jesus

13.text: And I will do whatever you ask in My name, so that the Father may be glorified in the Son.
13.speaker: Jesus

14.text: If you ask Me anything in My name, I will do it.
14.speaker: Jesus

15.text: If you love Me, you will keep My commandments.
15.speaker: Jesus

16.text: And I will ask the Father, and He will give you another Advocate to be with you forever —
16.speaker: Jesus

17.text: the Spirit of truth. The world cannot receive Him, because it neither sees Him nor knows Him. But you do know Him, for He abides with you and will be in you.
17.speaker: Jesus

18.text: I will not leave you as orphans; I will come to you.
18.speaker: Jesus

19.text: In a little while the world will see Me no more, but you will see Me. Because I live, you also will live.
19.speaker: Jesus

20.text: On that day you will know that I am in My Father, and you are in Me, and I am in you.
20.speaker: Jesus

21.text: Whoever has My commandments and keeps them is the one who loves Me. The one who loves Me will be loved by My Father, and I will love him and reveal Myself to him."
21.speaker: Jesus

verses.22: Judas (not Iscariot) asked Him, "Lord, why are You going to reveal Yourself to us and not to the world?"

segments.text: "If anyone loves Me, he will keep My word. My Father will love him, and We will come to him and make Our home with him.
segments.speaker: Jesus

24.text: Whoever does not love Me does not keep My words. The word that you hear is not My own, but it is from the Father who sent Me.
24.speaker: Jesus

25.text: All this I have spoken to you while I am still with you.
25.speaker: Jesus

26.text: But the Advocate, the Holy Spirit, whom the Father will send in My name, will teach you all things and will remind you of everything I have told you.
26.speaker: Jesus

27.text: Peace I leave with you; My peace I give to you. I do not give to you as the world gives. Do not let your hearts be troubled; do not be afraid.
27.speaker: Jesus

28.text: You heard Me say, 'I am going away, and I am coming back to you.' If you loved Me, you would rejoice that I am going to the Father, because the Father is greater than I.
28.speaker: Jesus

29.text: And now I have told you before it happens, so that when it does happen, you will believe.
29.speaker: Jesus

30.text: I will not speak with you much longer, for the prince of this world is coming, and he has no claim on Me.
30.speaker: Jesus

31.text: But I do exactly what the Father has commanded Me, so that the world may know that I love the Father. Get up! Let us go on from here."
31.speaker: Jesus

metadata.source: Derived from the Berean Standard Bible (BSB). Missing verses restored from the Textus Receptus tradition for completeness.
